video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: on table, recording, visually consistent. Close-up of a vintage tape recorder playing, with a red mug nearby., The voice of a younger, more fearful Lin Che emanates from the recorder. Narration: "The recorder plays Lin Che's own voice, younger and more afraid.". Protagonist A (younger, recorded) says: "If I forget, start from the red mug.". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Close-up of a vintage tape recorder on a wooden table, red mug beside it, warm dim kitchen lighting, nostalgic atmosphere, shallow depth of field, film grain. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

The voice of a younger, more fearful Lin Che emanates from the recorder.

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S031/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
